# Forward Impact

> Agent-aligned engineering standards platform. Define what good engineering
> looks like, generate career paths, AI agent profiles, and team capability
> analysis. Six products: Map, Pathway, Guide, Landmark, Summit, Outpost.

Forward Impact helps engineering organizations define skills, levels, and
behaviours in a shared agent-aligned engineering standard that humans and
AI agents both use. The data model is YAML-based and drives all products.
